entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud / Cloud for Customer – 2408 Release Briefing Webcast
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Did anyone enable the readiness check tool and generated the report? Still, we are yet to observe the report onto the Readiness check work center. Only one action 'Recalculate objects' are available.  
Did I miss any step in getting the report. Please suggest.

Thanks.

Gopalakrishnan S.

entry.title: Getting rid of header and footer while inserting video in SEN
entry.content:
Hi,

How to get rid of the top and bottom white colored area (which I have highlighted in below screenshot) when I insert a video to a book page?

entry.title: Re: CAP - CDS REPL to connect to db {kind : hana}
entry.content:
Hello Dinu,

My apologies for the delay on coming back to this. However, I spent some more time and noticed that cds.test() in REPL fails to recognize CDS syntax i.e. it fails to recognize keywords like ASPECT, IN, WHERE and also end of statement semi-colon (;). And finally it reports error 'CDS compilation failed' (see the image below). The problem appears to be for .cds files only.

I do not get any such error when running the application in with yarn cds-ts run --profile hybrid. The application runs fine on localhost:4004.

Do you have any suggestion on to fix this compilation error during in CDS REPL?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XM...
entry.content:
Hello Vijayendra

Thank you for your reply.
I already understand about the method you provided as a link.

The problem is that the client wants to automatically save the XML file in the background during operation, not for validation XML during SAP implementation.

We have changed the settings to specify XML as the channel for the output parameter determination application and XML as the output format for the print queue, but we are unable to achieve this.

Best Regards
Karti

entry.title: Re: How To reset SAP HANA Cloud Connector(SCC)'s built-in user(e.g. Administrator) password

entry.title: Re: Automatic packing of EWM Outbound delivery based on Packing Instructions (UPB)
entry.content:
Hello @DarshanEWM!

Very helpful blog, thank you!

entry.title: IFRS16 Lease Accounting: Configure ‘incentive’ with depreciation
entry.content:
My client has the following requirement: Sometimes, landlords give the lessee (my client) a cash “incentive” to use for store readiness/revamps. The payment from the landlord can be received at the beginning of a lease or during the lease. The amount from the landlord must reduce the asset value and depreciation.

The payment is made to the Landlord Contribution Account (LL Contrib).

They want to account for this amount on the REFX contract as follows:
1. Reduce the ROU value

2.Leave the lease liability unchanged
3.Reduce the asset value depreciation with the “incentive” amount and depreciate the lower value over the remaining life of the asset.

They therefore require a condition that will post as follows (directly or through reference flow types):

DR          Landlord Contrib

CR          ROU

Can someone please provide the config steps with reference flow types that I have to configure to achieve this?  A scenario like this is not covered in the SAP consulting note 2580277.

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data...
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to create API Provider as well. First of all it is give 404 Not Found warning while doing the connectivity test.

And if I try to create an API Proxy using that API Provider, it is not able to connect when I click on Discover option.

Regards,

Madhura

entry.title: Re: ABAP list's column width are not uniform.
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi, I'm using REUSE_ALV_BLOCK_LIST_APPEND, and REUSE_ALV_BLOCK_LIST_DISPLAY.

entry.title: Re: Driving Sustainability Through Process Optimization and Process Mining
entry.content: Great post! It’s exciting to see how sustainability and circular design are becoming key business strategies. SAP Signavio solutions can support these efforts by helping companies optimize processes, reduce waste, and use resources more efficiently, all while achieving sustainability goals and improving overall performance.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar - September 2024
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables the design, development, execution, governance, curation, analysis, and management of the full lifecycle of integration flows, APIs, and high-volume business events that connect on-premises and cloud-based processes, services, applications, and data across organizations. SAP Integration Suite is available on multiple cloud providers.

In this webinar, we'll have two sections:

Product Updates: Get updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.


OR

#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 participation
entry.content:
Dear Developers,

Good day. Most awaited Devtoberfest 2024 is announced. 

We have arranged 4 codejams in Kolkata and really hope more people participate from Kolkata location. 

Kindly refer this blog for the details. 

Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules - SAP Community

Those who are participating/ interested to participate, please do comment 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAC App designer - dropdown list shows all members of...
entry.content:
Hi there , as the previous comment - dropdowns will only show a flat list of dimension members.

You could fake it using a table with linked analysis to perform the filtering.
In this example below I used code in the green arrow image to expand/contract a panel which contains the table.

entry.title: error in data archive wizard
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When trying to run the Data Archiving Wizard Utility, I get the following error messages after running for almost 10 hours:

Error while analysing data; data archiving cannot proceed

I have checked this link because the error message is the same:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/data-archiving-error/qaq-p/7867212

but not solved. I have attached the log file for you to review

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Adding image URL to image component in SAP analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hi there, I've just tested this and it works on my SAC tenant.
Do you have the same problem if you as a test - paste the image url into the default value of the script variable?

Also wondering - you're using a shortened image URL -- does it work with a non-shortened URL?

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Asset Retirement
entry.content:
Hello Gabriel,

While using BAPI, we have an option to send Transaction Types. However, there are multiple Transactions Types used for Asset Retirement and business won't have idea to choose the right one. How should one choose the right T-Type in that case. Could you please expedite. thanks. 

 

Regards,

Nilesh

entry.title: Re: Change to error message for SAP message MM_PUR_SES 036
entry.content: As I know, the SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition doesn't allow message type changes like the On-Premise version due to its standard solution nature.

entry.title: Re: How to drill down on date while working on Live Model...
entry.content: To enable drill-down for date fields in SAP Analytics Cloud, ensure the fields are recognized as "Date" data type. If not, open your model, go to "Data View", find the date field, click on "Data Type" column, change it to "Date" and save. If the fields are already "Date" but drill-down doesn't work, they may lack sufficient information.

entry.title: Re: API for display CK13N result
entry.content: SAP does not provide a direct API to read the costing run data like CK13N. But may you can use BAPIs (Business Application Programming Interfaces) or RFCs (Remote Function Calls) to fetch the data from relevant tables.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start supports UI theme designer based branding
entry.content:
Hello ThiloBerndt,

Thank you for the article, it is very helpful.

I have also completed all the steps successfully, every step went good, but at last in mobile phone the theme is not applying. 

Anything you might be aware of where i might have missed?

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Database table protection or lock
entry.content:
If those (dirty) programs don't use any SAP lock concept, then (alas) you have to lock data at database level.

  • Consider using AMDP - Methods for Setting locks.
  • You'll probably also need to use them to update records.

If there are not too many such programs, better correc those to use SAP Locks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I am an SAP Business One Trainee Consultant from Lahore, Pakistan. As a CA student and a commerce graduate, I am keen to expand my skills and knowledge in the SAP ecosystem. I am particularly interested in learning SAP Analytics Cloud and believe that the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning is a fantastic opportunity for individuals like myself. I am eager to take on the challenge and undergo the necessary training to achieve SAP Certification.

Thank you for considering my interest in this initiative.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. Have you used the "Settings" to display the following columns?: Blocked (Logistics), Approval Status, Approver, and Approver Name? In addition, please make sure that all employees/users that you want to assign as approvers are currently employed in your company. Best regards Kathrin

entry.title: Re: Issue regarding multiple line items
entry.content:
@jabin1 

List Report table requires a set of unique keys. It appears that your table does not have a unique key, which may cause issues in displaying the results.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Inspection lot creation on Sales Return Ins...
entry.content: No Sir, EWM is already in place. After goods receipt via EWM on Inbound delivery, material gets transferred to EWM location but duplicate lot getting created which is non-stock relevant, if we keep that lot as it is, it won't affect anywhere. But it shows in the system as pending and user gets confused that's why need a solution to restrict that lot from creation after goods receipt

entry.title: Re: Getting Error while using HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION to update IT2006 record
entry.content: Thanks Kris, this really helped me! 🙂

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Asset Retirement
entry.content: Thank you, it worked!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - General Error with Filters
entry.content:
The :dir(rtl) selector is related to right-to-left text direction, commonly used for languages like Arabic or Hebrew. If the language or locale settings of your SAC environment or the data model are configured to a right-to-left language, there might be an issue with how this setting is being processed when applying filters.

Might be worth switching the tenant settings to a different language or locale to see if the issue persists.
But must admit i'm unsure what the actual proper fix would be.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content: Hello Kathrinferchland,Thankyou for the update, however even after filters only for posted invoice i cannot see any names or approvers name even though they are listed in he company i have attached screenshot again the question please have a look

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit in the Cloud – How to use baseline
entry.content:
Hello @OlgaDolinskaja , Thanks for another blog on updated process, as I am following your blogs to setup ATC on BTP ABAP instance.

We have template: SAP_BR_IT_PROJECT_MANAGER assigned to our users and communication scenario SAP_COM_0464 is assigned to the system. Still I am getting an error that: 'No authorization to create baseline'. 

Could you please suggest if we are missing any role to use the baseline feature.

Thanks and Regards

Nitin Goyal

entry.title: Column Remordplan SAP PS reporting S_ALR_87013558 PS
entry.content:
Dear experts,

launching the S_ALR_87013558 - Budget/Actual/Commitment/Rem Plan/Assigned report for a project, in the REMORDPLAN column for each WBE-related maintenance order does not return the detail of the planned value giving value 0.00. Instead, for each WBE the total value is correctly reported. Could you please explain the reason for this?

I have this problem for all S_ALR reports that contain the "REMORDPLAN" column.

Below the screen details. The system is ECC EHP8.

Thank you.

entry.title: CDS CAP Fiori Elements App with SideEffects on Parent Entity not triggered after action execution
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we have created a Fiori Elements application handling approvals on Workzone Admin privileques on Workspace Level. The application works fine as off now, but we are facing an issue while executing an actions on a sub entity (navigation) to update the parent entity:

After execution of the actions the first side effect to update the Approvals is triggered correctly:

Requests in batch call:

But indeed we need to update the navigation entities of the other navigations as well. But no side effect is beeing triggered.

I already found very helpfull posts, but nothing helped:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cap-with-fiori-elements-side-effects-custom-actions-dynamic-expressions/ba-p/13556745
  • https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/61cf21d50ed34cbf888713496c618904

I already tried follwing side effect in main "Workspaces" entity:

  • Try updating entities on property change
  • Update all Navigation on change in any other Navigation
  • Update OpenTasks Property after updating one of the depending navigations
  • Tried also to address parent entity in action SideEffect, but this seems not to work

All changed had no effect on the batch calls / updates on the entity level. Maybe I am doing something wrong

Any hint is welcome

Thanks

entry.title: Bounce Details Amazon SES
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for more details on the Bounce interactions that come in to SAP Marketing Cloud via Amazon SES.

The reason is that we get quite a lot of Soft Bounces that I believe should be Hard Bounces.

For example emails to an email address ending in @sknet.be which is a typo and should be skynet.be . But a soft bounce comes in on that address... Neverbounce does indicate this as an invalid address, so I am wondering why Amazon classifies it as a soft bounce.

 

I have already tried to look in the following fields for more details about the bounces:

  • Interaction Reason
  • Content Data

These fields sometimes contain additional data, but not in the case of my bounce on the @sknet address, on that case it is empty (and on a lot more cases too, about half of the soft bounces do have some value in the fields, the other half does not).

 

I also checked the analytics report mentioned on https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/sap-marketing-cloud-email-bounce-monitoring-best-practices/ba-p/13556163 , there is a field "Bus. Doc. Stat. Des." where for some soft bounces, more info about the smtp status code is mentioned, but still a large majority of soft bounces have an empty value in that field, including the soft bounce of the @sknet address case...

 

Does anyone know of any other data or fields that can be checked to get more detailed technical information about the bounce? 

Thanks,

Joyca

entry.title: Re: Google Captcha is not triggering for forgot password screen
entry.content: You can't add an RBA (which will trigger the captcha challange) for forgot password flow.

entry.title: MDG Cloud ready Mode: Integration of S/4HANA with SAP Build process automation & SAP Build work zone
entry.content:
Hi All,

In October 2023, SAP launched a new operational mode in MDG "CLOUD-READY MODE" for S/4 HANA 2023, following the principles of ABAP cloud and clean core methodology. Cloud-ready mode is only available for Business partners with Product domains in the MDG future roadmap. 

I briefly wrote about how this mode works in a previous blog post, hence if you have missed that you find the link below

Introducing MDG cloud ready mode for Business partners in S/4 HANA 2023

INTRODUCTION:

To setup cloud ready mode, we have following pre-requisites:

  1. An S/4 HANA 2023 private cloud edition system.
  2. A BTP tenant with at least one subaccount.
  3. Running instances of SAP build process automation, SAP Build workzone (standard Edition) and cloud connector

In this blog post, I will provide a detailed step by step approach to setup SAP build process automation and backend S/4 HANA 2023 for cloud ready mode.

MAIN CONTENT

BTP configuration:

  1.  We start by subscribing to SAP build process automation and SAP build workzone( standard edition ) in the BTP cockpit.
  2.  Assign the below role collections to your user. 

  3. On the destination tab in BTP cockpit, create the WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER destination. This destination will be used to import the live process packages in SAP build process automation.

    Note: The cloud foundry API end point and the URL for the destination should match as given in the SAP help portal. The user can be a generic user who doesn't have 2 factor authentication enabled. The details can be found Default Identity Provider | SAP Help Portal

     
  4. From Instances tab, launch the SAP build process automation lobby and import the Master data process approval & visualization project from the Store.

  5. Activate the 5 visibility scenarios, which we will use at a later stage.

     

  6. In the Instances tab in BTP cockpit, check sap_processautomation instance is created. Click on this and create a service key for the backend S4 HANA system.

     

  7. Assign MDG-specific BTP role collections to your user.

  8. The next step would be to setup the SAP build workzone. For the sap_processautomation instance create a service key for the workzone. 

  9. Once the key is created, create a destination for workzone. For details on how various parameters of the destination will be set, please refer to Configure SAP Build Process Automation Destinations | SAP Help Portal

     

  10. From the instances & subscription tag, launch the SAP build workzone standard edition application.
  11. In workzone, navigate to the content manager and choose the below 5 apps.
  12.  Create a local copy of the Visibility Scenario Dashboard app, change the title to Process Path Overview, and provide the navigation parameter scenarioID with the value com.sap.mdg.pv.ProcessVis.

     

  13. Create a group MDG and enable the My inbox and process path overview apps
  14. Assign the permissions for this 5 apps to everyone.
  15. Create a site with the same alias name as the group we created in step 13.

     

  16. Create the below destinations in BTP for your workflow and process path overview. Configure BTP Destinations | SAP Help Portal

     

S/4 HANA on-premise configuration:

Cloud ready mode should be activated in the S/4 HANA system, once activated classic MDG related apps for mass processing and consolidation will stop working and the new consolidation & mass processing apps for S/4 HANA 2023 needs to be used.

1.  Create an SM59 destination in S/4 HANA system and provide the host by pasting the same hostname as the MDG workzone site. The path prefix should be /site/mdg.

2. Create an entry in the SM30 view /UI2/V_ALIASMAP as below.

3. Go to MDGIMG-> cloud-ready mode and follow the path as per below screenshot to begin with integration of Build process automation with MDG. The subsequent steps will cover all the configurations in detail.

4. In Maintain the destination to an external server, create a destination MDG_BTP_SBPA_API. The host will be same as the API endpoint for the service key created in step6 of the BTP configuration section. You have to set SSL to active.

5. Now we maintain the OAuth Client 2.0 for secure communication between SBPA & S4 HANA.

Create a new profile configuration:
For the OAuth 2.0 client profile, choose SWF_CPPA_OAUTH_PROFILE. Enter a configuration name, for example, the name of the subaccount of your service.
For the client ID, enter the JSON value $.uaa.clientid from your service key card.
Enter the client secret by copying it from the BTP instance sap_processautomation service key for S4 HANA system.
Navigate to the Authorization Server Settings section, paste the uaa-URL from your service key to the Authorization Endpoint field, and add the /oauth/authorize suffix. In the same section, add the uaa-URL from your service key to the Token Endpoint field, and add the /oauth/token suffix.

6. Activate the following OData Services:
• MASTERDATACHANGEPROCESSSB
• C_MDCHGPROCESSBPMATCH_SRV
• SWF_CPWF_NOTIFICATION_SRV
• SWF_CPPV_INTEGRATION_SRV

7.  Authorization needs to be assigned to the user which will communicate between S4 HANA and SBPA. I have used a generic user with all the MDG roles. Hence not sharing the details for this step. 

8.  We maintain the connectivity with workflow capability. The configuration name is same as the configuration done for OAuth 2.0 client configuration in step 5

9.Maintain connectivity for generic event API of visibility capability. The configuration name is same as the configuration done for OAuth 2.0 client configuration in step 5.

10. Create a destination which will call back the S/4 HANA system. Here the URL should be the same as the one exposed in the cloud connector. The generic user should have sufficient authorizations. The user I used has all the MDG roles, hence not shared in detail.

CONCLUSION:

By following through the steps mentioned in this blog post, you will be able to setup MDG cloud ready mode with a fully functional workflow in SAP build process automation. 

Cloud ready mode is the stepping-stone for next-gen master data management providing features like Data federation, integration with address provider CDQ.

Hope this will help you start your MDG cloud ready mode journey.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP Build Process Automation  SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP S/4HANA  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition SAP Business Technology Platform ABAP Cloud SAP S/4HANA business partner 

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: RAP show messages in popup
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a clean core RAP application, which is changing data from purchase orders. Since the business objects are not released for use in private cloud scenarios, but only for the public cloud, I am relying on the old Bapis. These Bapi calls are wrapped in a tier 2 software component and are called in testmode inside of the transactional phase and without testrun in the save phase.

Since we offer a function to change the data for multiple rows at the same time, the error messages which are shown in the default error message popup are not really helpful. This is because the error message popup has no connection between the error messages from the Bapi and which line of my list report is causing the problem.

Therefore I already created an own message database table, in which I am storing the return information of the Bapis together with the keys of my list report. My list report information is also already connected to the messages using associations in my CDS views. And using an additional CDS view I am already calculating the worst return message, which is available for my list report row. So I could already create a field, which is showing this as a processing icon:

The only thing what is missing is, that I want to click on the icon and want to display all the messages for the corresponding row. So basically showing all data using an assocation in a popup. Currently I have no idea how to do this only using metadata extensions. Does somebody have an idea how this is possible?

Greetings

Felix

entry.title: SAP Document Management Service: Create Internal Repository
entry.content:
Hi,

i want to create an respository via API, as descriped here:https://help.sap.com/docs/document-management-service/sap-document-management-service/onboarding-repository?locale=en-US

POST https://.....hana.ondemand.com/rest/v2/repositories

{
  "repository": {
    "displayName": "my name",
    "description": "my description",
    "repositoryType": "internal",
    "isVersionEnabled": "true",
    "isVirusScanEnabled": "true",
    "skipVirusScanForLargeFile": "false",
    "isThumbnailEnabled": "false",
    "hashAlgorithms": "SHA-256",
    "isContentBridgeEnabled": "true",
    "externalId": "53b612b8-8253-4aea-bccf-4cc03ef5190b",
    "repositoryParams": [
      {
        "paramName": "classificationEnabled",
        "paramValue": "true"
      }
    ]
  }
}
 
But I get 500 Internal Server Error:
{"message":"Error in OnBoarding Repository: Exception During Connecting to ECM Repo"}
 
What could be wrong?
Where can I look what this error is caused by?
 
Thank you,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Change Dates of Started Production Orders
entry.content:
I have a similar scenario where my Valid from date in the BoM for input products is 27.07.2024 the request date start 12.07.2024.

When confirming tasks seems like the Input products do not get pulled for confirmation.

 

I have managed changing the earliest start date and latest stop date to ensure they are after the Input products in the BoM are Valid that's 27.07.2024, But still the products don't get pulled into the task for confirmation. 

 

Anything I might have skipped?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Upgrade Challenges from SAP B1 8.81 to SAP B1 10.00 release family
entry.content:
That's not malarky... there will be no contractual sap support loss because there are no update, insert or delete statements. Don't judge like that.Everyone can direct upgrade from 8.81 release family to 10.00 release family. I have proved it.

My experience in SAP B1 since 2007 and I've solved so much issued in SAP B1 including Q&A in the SCN old forum. My last badge is diamond with point above 15,000 but now sap has deleted it my badge.

Only if the version difference is more than 3 versions, the direct upgrade is prohibited for all very earliest versions. E.g. 6,7 to SAP  B1 10.00, 2004A to SAP B1 10.00, 2005A and 2007A.

You can ask me all about the sap b1 versions. I have solved many issues in those earliest versions.

entry.title: Re: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XM...
entry.content:
Hello @Karti 

Further to your query, 

Functionality you are expecting to automatically save the XML is not possible. What i can tell is to download the PDF as per below and then convert them into XML in someway, if possible.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2764853 

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Extension Application: Standard modules not loading
entry.content: It would be helpful if we could review all the information in a GitHub repository. That way, we can easily see where the issue might be and work together to resolve it more efficiently.

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Extension Application: Standard modules not...
entry.content: Issue is resolved. We moved the code of jQuery.sap.require to sap.ui.define section

entry.title: Want to know how to implement password management od SAPSR3 user
entry.content:
Business wants password policy for expiry, invalid attempts etc. to be implemented for all db users, including db default & SAPSR3 schema user. How to do and what is the impact.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Want to know how to implement password management od...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please check below notes to implement the password management:

2572276 - Password Complexity Verification Function 
1519872 - SAP Database User Profile SAPUPROF

Best regards,
SAP Support

anything missed in this above?

pls suggest

entry.title: GST Margin scheme on second hand material purchases
entry.content:
Hi

Could you please suggest to configure the pricing to procure second hand materials, where the GST is to be consider on the Marginal value and not on total value of, For Ex: if a seller selling second hand bottles @ Rs.10/- out of which the Margin scheme (taxable) value is Rs.4/- then GST will be charged on Rs.4/- @ 18%, so total bill value will be Rs.10.72/- (6 + 4 + 0.72)

Regards

Bhanu prakash

entry.title: Re: Adding image URL to image component in SAP analytics...

Hope this helps,

SonTran

Thanks
Arunteja

entry.title: Re: Adding image URL to image component in SAP analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hi Jbarlow,

Thank you for your time testing on this.

1. I have kept the same image url on script variable's default value but still didnt work.

2. Can you elaborate what you meant by a shortened image URL? I use this "https://images.app.goo.gl/gKt8zA6trFH8ZHGt8" image url from google for my testing. My actual requirement is to retrieve the image from sharepoint and display it here in SAC.

3. Can you let me know the source of the url which you used in your testing?

Regards,

entry.title: Vlookup in Crystal Reports with 2 sub reports
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

I need to do a vlookup between 2 sub reports in Crystal.

Any idea how I can achieve this ?

e.g. below

 

I want to see which item on the right report shows in the left report.

Please assist.

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to view and change the settlement profile for a production order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content: Could you please guide me on how to view the settlement profile used by a production order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? By default, the system creates a posting rule for materials, but we want all production costs to be assigned to a project (PS). Is it possible to configure the settlement rule for a production order to use a PEP element instead?

entry.title: Re: Commodity Price Engine - Provision Price.
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please refer to SAP help  CPE blocking reasons  when the prices are still provisional. 
Ideally the prices should be updated even on sales order if you are re-evaluating the documents(as that does re-pricing). 

Best Regards

Pawan

entry.title: Re: Planning interchangeable materials in MRP Live
entry.content:
@Caetano ...is it applicable for Automotive industry as well?

Regards

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: RAP attachments with Virtual elements
entry.content: I can see in debug mode with $value but I can't able to download from output

entry.title: Re: RTE:[89134] Proxy server connect: Host unreachable
entry.content:
The error message suggests the proxy server is unreachable due to possible issues like server malfunction, unstable network, incorrect server details, or firewall/security settings blocking the connection.

To fix this, you could check the points below:

1. Verify the proxy server is operational.
2. Ensure a stable network connection.
3. Confirm the proxy server's IP address and port number.
4. Check firewall/security settings aren't blocking the connection.
5. Update the connection string if necessary.
6. Update the hdbcli package to the latest version.

If the problem persists, please open a support ticket.

entry.title: Re: Decrypting SAP IBP Optimiser Logs
entry.content:
Hi Smartcons,

Clicking on the "Browse Input Log" (macro Select_Input_File) and "Browse Output Log" (macro Select_Output_File) buttons result in a VBA Run-time error '76' (Path not found) error.

This issue does not occur for "Browse Mapping Log" (macro Select_Mapping_File).

The VBA is password-protected so I can not debug. Please try to re-produce the error from your side.

I have sent an e-mail to @ajayprakash notifying him of the same.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Select ship to party in outbound delivery creation in subcontracting process
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the following case:

In the subcontracting process, the supplier have different locations to perform the assembly. 

The supplier of the subcontracting process have assigned a customer with different ship to party partner functions. Each of ship to party customer corresponds to one of the supplier locations.

When we create the outbound delivery to send the components to the supplier, the outbound delivery is created with the customer associated to the supplier as a SHIP TO PARTY of the outbound delivery created.

We want to select the ship to party when we create the outbound delivery to assign the correct delivery address in the outbound delivery.

How can we do it?

Is it possible to do what we need to do in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 

Thanks for the support.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Which correct report showing Item cost and it's total...
entry.content:
Hi,

Inventory Audit Report is correct. It reflects all inventory transactions and link to inventory account of accounting view.

This report provides an audit trail for the posted inventory transactions in the chart of accounts. You use this report to make comparisons between the accounting view (inventory balance accounts) and the logistics view (inventory value displayed by the audit report). If they don't match, there is something wrong.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Re: Adding image URL to image component in SAP analytics...
entry.content:
I suspect it's the image / url that's the issue.
When I grab an image is use the 'copy image address' option to grab the full url.

e.g.

 

https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/D5612AQHD7jTR8yZHSw/article-cover_image-shrink_600_2000/0/1710061400106?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=PCooiy1mc58-lOBIlvuxzudqSrFifLJw5pUv3pCCja4

entry.title: Re: Creating a Fiori Starter Application in SAP Web IDE for Sales Order Tracking Part 1
entry.content:
i need any article in which selection screen in sap ui5 screen like if user add one PO on selection screen then it get the relevant data  from ODATA.

Kindly its urgent and need help

entry.title: Re: ECC & SDI Integraion with HANA Cloud "Compatibility o...
entry.content: SDI integration with HANA Cloud and ECC 7.0 should be possible. Prerequisites include: ECC system on a supported database for SDI, installation of DP Agent on a system that can connect to both ECC and HANA Cloud, availability of SDI license, and installation of necessary SDI adapters on the DP Agent.

entry.title: Re: Why encrypt SAP HANA persistent data and log ?
entry.content: Encrypting SAP HANA data and log is vital for data protection, compliance, and preventing insider threats. Encryption prevents unauthorized access to sensitive data and meets regulatory requirements. Even with access to the OS or admin account, encrypted data remains unreadable. Strong access controls should protect the SSFS store and master key.

entry.title: What is the Payroll ID field ?
entry.content: I have a Person ID with multiple employments (User IDs) and multiple payrolls across different companies. Do I need a separate Person ID for each payroll, or can I have a single Person ID and assign a Payroll ID for each company under the same Person ID?

entry.title: Re: SSO two domains, no trust, logon via logon group
entry.content: And i would not use snc/identity/as = p:CN=SAP/Kerberos<SID>@OLDDOMAIN.COM in any case. I recommend you change that to p:CN=Kerberos<SID> which means the domain part will be used from the current users domain and the SAP/ will always be used by default, so in this case your SPN SAP/Kerberos<SID> dont have to be changed at all. Check out this blog for some more details: https://xiting.com/en/sap-single-sign-on-insider-tips-volume-4/

entry.title: Re: reading monitoring views using JDBC in HANA with runt...
entry.content: SAP HANA licensing terms vary per agreement, making it hard to definitively answer your question. Generally, if your utility only reads from monitoring views without modifying or accessing business data, it shouldn't violate the license. I'm unaware of third-party providers offering SAP PCE S/4 HANA testing environments. Please contact your SAP account representative for accurate information based on your agreement.

entry.title: Re: Integração de tabelas SAP com SQL Server
entry.content: Extracting data from SAP to SQL Server can be challenging due to SAP's unique HANA database structure. However, strategies include using Integration Services for high-performance data integration, direct querying if you have SAP database access, third-party tools for easier data extraction, and SAP Data Services for ETL tasks. The best strategy depends on your specific needs, data volume, complexity, and technical skills.

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect PostgreSQL DB with Visual Studio Cr...
entry.content:
I see what you are doing wrong now.

You are using a ODBC connection so you use the DSN name and not the actual Server connection string, that is defined in the DSN.

Also the DSN should be a System DSN so IIS has access to it.

If you are changing connection info you need to use ReplaceConnection() to update the reports data source.

entry.title: Re: how to read a file from server from a tenant database?
entry.content: To read a file from a HANA server's tenant database, use the SQL IMPORT FROM statement, ensuring you have the necessary privileges and the file is in a compatible format (CSV, TXT, etc.).

entry.title: Re: Why encrypt SAP HANA persistent data and log ?
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your response.

However, your response is alike the SAP security guidelines documentation that invite us all, in an unquestionable way, to implement these functionalities for the sake of protection, compliance, regulatory requirements ... etc.

At the end, probably much of us, don't know how they are being used to prevent attacks. Having technical knowledge of the nature of threads will definitely help you in defining a strong security strategy and at the very bottom end, if encryption is really necessary in your environment.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Error when extraction data source 0FS_CTR_NO_ATTR tco...
entry.content:
Hi,

The extractor is is not defined for Full load. you can bypass this by calling the extractor in delta mode. This can be done using the debugger. Follow these steps:

- Call transaction RSA3. 

- In the transaction set the execution mode to Debug Mode and execute (F8)

- Once executed the Debugger will run. In the debugger set the variable i_updmode. 

- Now start going with the debugger step by step with F5 until it shows the updmode value is shown with value F. 

 

- Click on the pen and change it to D for delta or any other mode you desire and confirm. 

 

- lastly, run the debugger through with F8 and you it will not show the error but rather what data that would be extracted. 

 

Hope this helps. 

Salam

entry.title: Re: reading monitoring views using JDBC in HANA with runt...
entry.content: Thanks Hakan. Apparently the official stance of SAP is that this should be a license violation. Our SAP account executive Wong, Elizabeth <elizabeth.wong01@sap.com> is extremely helpful with her silence. Thanks anyways

entry.title: Abap program to end specific User's Program, by sesion/tcode or GUIID
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I've seen this posted quite  few times, posted here but it does not seem to work properly for me, and wanted to know what I was doing wrong.

So what I want to do is end a specific users program/session which they have started, it would be great if I could end it by GUI-id but I havnt been able to find any info on doing that. But atleast to be able to do it by session & tcode, this would have to be done via the background, with no user interaction.

What I've tried is to get the info on users by
CALL FUNCTION 'TH_USER_LIST'
  TABLES
    list = lt_UINFO
    USRLIST = lt_USRINFO
  EXCEPTIONS
    others   = 1. 

and then kill the session by
CALL FUNCTION 'TH_DELETE_USER'
  EXPORTING
    client = sy-mandt  " Current client
    user   =  ls_usrinfo-bname   " Username of the session
    tid    =  ls_usrinfo-tid    " Session ID (TID) to end
  EXCEPTIONS
    OTHERS = 1.
as I've seen other people on here say it worked for them, but this ends the users entire session, all their current transaction and not just a specific program or tcode and thus wont work for me.

Does anybody know of a good way to end a users specific transaction/program or guiid?

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content: Hi, yes I see the screenshot, thanks for that. If the invoice is part of one of the flexible workflow scenarios, the approval details should exist in the detail data of the invoice and the approval status and name should be available in the list. The question would be whether the flexible workflow scenarios are active and whether the start conditions are met? Can the Approver find the invoice in MyInbox? Unfortunately, I cannot support without more data (if you suspect a mistake, an IT ticket would be better). best regards Kathrin

entry.title: Re: Every single time I try to use Java it wont work
entry.content:
It's console.log().

I created a test app, with button that runs a JavaScript flow function.

The JavaScript includes console.log output, plus it returns some info based on the input.

When you run it and click the button, the console message can be seen.

The console message will be displayed even if the JavaScript crashes, as in this case, where I did not do anything but print out a console message and did not provide the output. 

HTH

entry.title: Soldoc issue with search by file content
entry.content: Hi all. We have a problem with search in soldoc. We uploaded two .docx files in soldoc. There is no any transaction code in name or description. But we have t-code in file content. When we try to search files by t-code we have only one document in results. What’s wrong may be with second?

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content: Hello Kathrin,Thankyou for the information .will check on it.

entry.title: EDI - Exceedingly Delirious Interface
entry.content:
“That’s all folks”:

surely in your heterodox life , you have come across this inscription that used to head at the end of every Warner Bros show for young and old from 1930 to the present.

From the newest Bugs Bunny or Porky Pig to the oldest Bosko.  How many characters!

It’s difficult to find someone who never heard about them.  Over the years they change to find ways to stay relevant to modern people.

Characters was extremely crazy.

 

 

 

So we can say that “It’s NOT all Folks”.

The same we could say in techology facilitators. They invent always a new technology to adapt to the audience. But WHY? To make us smile? I really don’t thinks so. Pheraps they play with our lives in a sadistic way, like the poor victims of Bugs Bunny like Yosemite Sam or Elmer Fudd.

And pay attention: you could study all the economic matters in the world but you’ll never find a motivation to the EDI existence today .

This intro to say that EDI (or Electronic Data Interchange if you don’t know)  was first introduced in 1960 when a man, Ed Gulbert,  probably a sad guy animated by greateness to leave a sign in the history, developed a form of electronic comunication between shipment supply chains in the US army.. Yes always them, they like to create sufference in the world. 

In an era before Internet, EDI  enabled instant  long-distance communication, better than rely  on slow postal services.  They say… but I always received postal card from vacations… anyway..

EDI was a critical facilitator of early globalization. If globalization today is a fact, it’s because of EDI. Say thanks to Ed Gui if today we live in this crazy world.

 

Let’s go to the point.

What’s EDI in poor words?

EDI it’s  a hierarchical data in  an insane flat file format.

You have to know the schema. But sorry for you but the schema is  a copyrighted secret, very huge, and can be interpreted in millions of ways.

And last but not least: exchange is ad Hoc so you have to buy or create the wheel every single time you have to deal with EDI.

Good way to make companies spend their money. Thanks EdGui (That’s Iron Maiden reference)

It’s a Pay to PLAY.

Tools are old and entreched and they’re expensive because licensing suppresses freely available technology or implementations.

XML was introduced in 1996, and completely obsoleted this technology over 20 years ago but EDI persist  thanks to BIG players  inertia in the market.

It’s a kind of scam.

If you work for a large company and have access to the tools it’s not bad, but if you’re small or your company want to give a penny for it, you can spend months and still months, getting someone at SPS to cough up what is at the end of the day just a text file. Probably billions are shaved off the global economy each year by EDI.

 

Learning EDI is hard as learning to swim sure, all master and knowledge lovers would say “keep trying, resist, never give up”… That’s not the matters we talk about.

The problem is that they are asking you to swim across the ocean, arms and legs, when you have ships, boats, planes, jets at your disposal.

 

I’m agree with you, if you give me TIME, FOOD, ASSISTANCE and everything I would need, probably I could survive. But the question remains: “WHY?” Probably company is conviced to pay less? It’s the same question when your city’s major thinks that it’s not a problem if someone remains in the road. The main thing to support is the city and his power.

 

So, after all, are you still convinced to use EDI? Probably I will write down the implementation that I choosed to adopt but against my will. With no tools, because tools costs they say. Without informations, because knowledge on EDI is copyrigthted.

Why I did it? Not because I was comanded, not for sure. Probably because you should always try everything, before talking about something, even though you want to speak about it badly.

 

That’s NOT all Folks 😊

*All ri

entry.title: Re: setting data with SetDataSource in c#
entry.content:
Hi Adam,

Does it work in CR Designer? Always test what you want to in the Designer first then in code it should work.

I believe what you need to do is link the subreport to the main reports parameter so the subreport filters on the parameter in it's WHERE clause.

If you don't link it you will always get the last value in the query, which sounds like is what is happening.

Remember, for each result returned in the main report query the subreport runs, so if 100 records are returned in the main report the subreport runs 100 times.

Next is since you are using a Parameter and a Stored Procedure you need to set the parameter value before setting the log on info.

See my test app for more info:

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Note also the subreport needs to have it's data source set also, it's in the sample also.

Once you get the report working in the designer you can use the DataSet in code.

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

thanks for a helpful blog!

Is it possible to add custom fixed values to the SAP standard domain in ABAP Cloud? (like we can do it via "Fixed Value Append" in OnPrem).

Kind regards,

Kristi

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation for special depreciation
entry.content:
We are having a business scenario where we use special depreciation and ordinary depreciation in one depreciation key. Special depreciation is used to post initial allowance and ordinary depreciation is used to post annual depreciation.

To do adjustment to ordinary depreciation we use unplanned depreciation.

Is there a way where we can post adjustment to system calculated special depreciation  something like an unplanned special depreciation??

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unplanned depreciation for special depreciation
entry.content:
Indeed a manual correction posting is possible to special depreciation.

Please use the transactions ABZU(N/L), ABAA(N/L) etc, and select the transaction types dedicated to correct special depreciatin.

Some examples are:  

700 Write-up ordinary and special depreciation

720 Write-up special tax depreciation

620  Manual spec. dep. on prior-yr acquis per dep. key
630  Manual spec. dep. on curr-yr acquis per dep. key

However, there are no transaction types on unplanned special depreciation. Please contact your local SAP Consultant in order to create an own transaction type for this purpose.

entry.title: Re: SAC App designer - dropdown list shows all members of...
entry.content:
To be honest , a dropdown can be populated using any underlying model as the source.
The code below is the bare bones to populate a dropdown list.

Model:                 Best Run Juice
Dimension:          Location_4nm2e04531    (Location)
Table Name:        Table_1
Dropdown:          ddl_location

Script:
var location=Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("Location_4nm2e04531");
for (var l=0;l<location.length;l++)
              {ddl_location.addItem(location[l].id,location[l].description);}

entry.title: Re: Favorite book and SAP Community Readers?
entry.content:
Hey Tammy! 

I have a question for you: 
"My favorite books is always the last book I read"

Do you stop a book if you don't like it before reading it, or do you always continue until the end? 
Do you read multiple books at the same time? 

Those are the questions I usually ask to my reader friends 😄

entry.title: Re: Unable to find inactive users search button in employee profile
entry.content:
Hi,

In my view when in the permissions, there is no option for "Include inactive employees in the search" when looking at Manage User-permission...

 

However, I found where to do this. It was in permissions - Manage recruits - Include Inactive Employees in the search
Then the inactive users all showed when searching

entry.title: Re: Favorite book and SAP Community Readers?
entry.content:
I'm not ready yet for a SAP Community Book Club. 
Because most of the time I want to read what I want. My presence will be partial for sure. 😅

entry.title: Re: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content: If you are referring to the positioning of the XML nodes themselves, then it does not matter because XML is a hierarchical structure.

BR

entry.content:

Fatal error in , line 0
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   # Check failed: IsGlobalEmpty().
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #
